title: Gymnosporia austroyunnanensis

This plant is further classified within the genus Gymnosporia, which consists of species of shrubs and trees native to tropical and subtropical regions. The species Gymnosporia austroyunnanensis is a flowering plant that is native to specific regions of Asia, and its classification reflects its botanical characteristics and geographical distribution. The family Celastraceae is part of the larger clade of rosids, which are a large and diverse group of flowering plants.
